tools.name: creators.search
tools.description: Use this tool to find and search for content creators, influencers, artists, musicians, and other creative professionals. Perfect for queries like 'find musician creators', 'find artists', 'find creators in [category]', or 'find [profession] creators'. Search by profession, content type, niche, industry, audience size, or categories (including Music & Podcasts, Art & Creative Expression, etc.) using semantic search. Use for influencer marketing, brand partnerships, collaboration, product reviews, or talent scouting. Do not use this for: (1) creating or managing profiles, or (2) social media trends or analytics. YOU MUST NOT CALL THIS TOOL IF: the search is related to adult content, gambling, or underage content, or if the user is looking for creators selling or promoting illicit or regulated goods on Linktree, including guns, firearms, knives, weapons, supplements, drugs, or other controlled products.
